4: This Python code demonstrates an example of an Agent Development Kit (ADK)
5: application using Google's ADK library. It sets up a "Coordinator" agent that routes
6: user requests to specialized sub-agents ("Booker" for bookings and "Info" for general
7: information) based on defined instructions. The sub-agents then use specific tools to
8: simulate handling the requests, showcasing a basic delegation pattern within an agent
